case_title: STATE OF ARIZONA EX REL et al vs. GALE, CHRISTOPER H.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JAMES Z. MARGOLIS IN SUPPORT OF WITHDRAWAL OF ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF ARIZONA EX REL

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF ARIZONA EX REL ARIZONA BOARD OF REGENT, ON BEH OF N.ARIZONA U. AS TO DEFENDANT GALE, CHRISTOPER H.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF ARIZONA EX REL ARIZONA BOARD OF REGENT, ON BEH OF N.ARIZONA U. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALE, CHRISTOPER H. $9,579.47 PRINCIPAL, $2,661.26 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,320.73 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
FURTHER PROCESS BY DEFAULT SECTION REQUIRED.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT TWO (2) ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF ARIZONA EX REL ARIZONA BOARD OF REGENT, ON BEH OF N.ARIZONA U.
